name: Dahl Palak
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak split peas in 2 cups water for 1 hour.
2. Add turmeric and 1/2 teaspoon salt to the split peas. Bring to a boil using the same water used to soak the peas.
3. Cook for 10 minutes until the split peas are done.
4. In a skillet, heat butter/oleo. Add ginger and garlic. Cook until the garlic is golden.
5. Add Garam Masala to the skillet.
6. Immediately add the seasoned ginger and garlic mixture to the spinach-split pea combination.
7. Add lemon juice and salt to taste. Serve.
